nasb.text: When the officials of Judah heard these things, they came up from the king’s house to the house of the Lord and sat in the entrance of the New Gate of the Lord’s  house.

esv.text: When the officials of Judah heard these things, they came up from the king’s house to the house of the Lord and took their seat in the entry of the New Gate of the house of the Lord.

cnv.text: 猶大的領袖聽見了這些事，就從王宮上到耶和華的殿，坐在耶和華殿裡新門的入口。

ccb.text: 犹大的首领得知后，就离开王宫，上到耶和华的殿，坐在耶和华殿新门的入口。
